patient.query: Yeah, I guess it’s just been really tough lately. I had a falling out with a close friend, and it feels like I can’t get the issues sorted out. I just keep replaying everything in my head, thinking about what I should have said or done differently. It’s kind of consuming me.

patient.query: It’s like, every time I think about reaching out, this voice in my head just says, “What if they don’t want to hear from you?” Or, “What if I just make everything more awkward?” It’s so frustrating because I miss the good times we had, but I feel like I’m just stuck in this loop of doubt and fear. It’s hard to see a way out sometimes.

automatic_thoughts: What if they don’t want to hear from you?
What if I just make everything more awkward?

Sometimes I wonder if I even deserve to fix things or if it’s better to just let it go, but then I can’t shake this feeling that I haven’t tried hard enough. It just feels… confusing.
